description: Issue a canonical CAIP-122 / SIWOF message for the caller to sign with a wallet they own. Used by dApps to authenticate users via 'Sign In With OpenFederation'.

walletAddress.description: An active wallet linked to the caller's DID (any custody tier).

audience.description: Full URL of the dApp requesting sign-in (e.g. https://game.example.com).

chainId.description: Optional CAIP-2 chain identifier (e.g. eip155:137 for Polygon). Defaults per chain.

statement.description: Optional human-readable prompt shown to the user in their wallet.

resources.description: Optional URIs the signature also vouches for.

message.description: The canonical CAIP-122 message string to sign.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or malformed audience.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: WalletNotFound
errors.description: No active wallet with the given address for this DID.
